text: The commissioner shall, not later than January first, nineteen hundred seventy-eight, submit to the governor and to the legislature a report on the operation and maintenance of such stations.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 3
#### Article 5
##### § 309-E — Reports

The commissioner shall, not later than January first, nineteen hundred seventy-eight, submit to the governor and to the legislature a report on the operation and maintenance of such stations.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
